header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: Manage your profile, security and preferences

gate.title: Login required
gate.text: This setting is tied to your account. Log in to access it.
gate.appearanceNoteSuffix: setting (light/dark theme) is available without an account.

profil.title: Edit profile
profil.usernameInvalid: 3 to 20 characters: lowercase letters, digits, _ only.
profil.usernameHint: Optional — your unique handle on TrouveTout224.
profil.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
profil.emailChangeHintPrefix: To change your email address, go to the
profil.phoneHint: This number is used for WhatsApp contact on your listings.
profil.phoneInvalid: Invalid number. Expected format: 6XX XX XX XX (9 digits, starting with 6).
profil.cooldownPassword: For your security, you'll be able to change your password again in {days} day{plural} (on {date}).

securite.title: Account security
securite.googleAccountHint: Your account was created with Google, so you don't have a password yet. Set one below so you can also log in with your email.
securite.forgotPassword: Forgot your password? Reset it by email
securite.emailNone: You don't have an email address yet.
securite.emailSent: A confirmation link was sent to {email}. Click it to confirm the change.
securite.emailChangeHint: A confirmation link will be sent to the new address — the change only takes effect once you click it.
securite.sqHint: Let you recover your account if you lose access to your email — handy if you rarely check your inbox.
securite.sqNoneHint: Add 2 or 3 so you can recover your account even without access to your email.
securite.sqFooterHint: Your answers are stored encrypted (like a password) — no one can read them, only verify that they match.

errors.newPasswordRequired: Fill in all the new password fields.
errors.passwordCriteria: The new password doesn't yet meet all the rules below.
errors.passwordSameAsOld: The new password must be different from the current one.
errors.sqQuestionRequired: Choose a question for each row.
errors.sqAnswerTooShort: Each answer must contain at least 2 characters.
errors.sqDuplicate: Choose different questions from each other.

newMessages.label: New messages
newMessages.sub: Be notified when you receive a message

publicProfile.label: Public profile
publicProfile.sub: Your profile is visible to all users

showPhone.label: Show my number
showPhone.sub: Your number is visible on your listings

apparence.title: Appearance
apparence.subtitle: Choose how TrouveTout224 looks on your device.

textSize.title: Text size
textSize.subtitle: Adjusts the text size across the whole site.

accentColor.title: Accent color
accentColor.subtitle: Changes the main color of buttons, links and active elements.

eventThemes.title: Event themes
eventThemes.subtitle: Festive moods with a decorative banner at the top of the page.

voix.title: Assistant voice
voix.subtitle: Choose the voice used by the assistant during a voice call, and adjust its speaking speed.
voix.loading: Looking for voices available on this device...
voix.noneAvailable: No compatible voice was found on this device. Voice calls aren't available, but you can keep using the text assistant.

items.publier: How do I post a listing?
items.signalement: How do I report a problem?

conditions.title: Terms of use
conditions.intro: By using TrouveTout224, you accept these terms.

section1.title: 1. Use of the service
section1.text: TrouveTout224 is a listings platform intended for residents of Guinea. The minimum age is 13.

section2.title: 2. Prohibited content
section2.text: It is strictly forbidden to post illegal, offensive content, scams, nudity or violence.

section3.title: 3. Liability
section3.text: TrouveTout224 is not responsible for transactions between users. Be careful and meet sellers in public places.

apropos.mission: The largest listings and marketplace platform in Guinea. Our mission is to connect buyers and sellers all across Guinea.

toasts.usernameInvalidError: Invalid username (3 to 20 characters: letters, digits, _).
